<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## How was it tested?

<!-- e.g. CC_DEMO=1 python3 server.py; and/or against a real host -->

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets or personal data (IPs, hostnames, keys, real paths) in code, screenshots, or commits
- [ ] `python3 -m py_compile server.py enrich.py` passes
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies / no frontend build step added
- [ ] User-facing strings are in English
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
